channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Adrian Higham’s career, health challenges, and life after leaving BBC’s The Bidding Room
item.description: Adrian Higham is an English antiques dealer and TV personality best known for appearing on BBC One’s show The Bidding Room. He gained popularity due to his strong bidding skills and lively personality...

item.title: Trump reviews proposed 60-day Iran ceasefire extension amid ongoing US-Iran negotiations
item.description: The live updates report on escalating diplomatic and military developments linked to the ongoing West Asia conflict involving Iran, the United States, and Israel. U.S. President Donald Trump held a hi...

item.title: India Women Beat England by 38 Runs in T20I Series Opener
item.description: In the first match of the three-match women’s T20I series at Chelmsford, India produced a strong performance to defeat England by 38 runs. India, playing without regular captain Harmanpreet Kaur, init...

item.title: US federal judge orders removal of Trump’s name from Kennedy Center facade after unlawful board decision
item.description: A United States federal court in Washington has ordered that the Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts remove President Donald Trump’s name from its building facade and official branding. The ruling ...

item.title: Arsenal’s Premier League triumph gives Arteta’s side confidence ahead of Champions League final against PSG
item.description: The article argues that Arsenal enter the Champions League final against Paris Saint-Germain in an unusual position: free from the pressure and anxiety that have defined much of Mikel Arteta’s tenure....

item.title: Louis Vuitton Unveils Unique Mechanical Clock for UNICEF Charity Auction
item.description: Louis Vuitton has introduced a highly exclusive mechanical clock created in collaboration with UNICEF and Swiss clockmaker L’Épée 1839. The piece is a singular work of design and horology that blends ...

item.title: Canadian guilty plea in assisted suicide case leads National Post roundup covering reconciliation debate, healthcare strain and crime updates
item.description: The National Post’s front-page roundup for May 29, 2026 presents a collection of major Canadian news stories spanning legal, social, healthcare, and public policy issues. A central item reports that K...

item.title: Denise Welch hints at potential participation in Strictly Come Dancing 2026
item.description: Denise Welch has suggested she may be involved in the upcoming 2026 series of Strictly Come Dancing, though the official celebrity line-up has yet to be confirmed by the BBC following recent changes t...

item.title: Olivia Attwood sparks speculation over relationship with Pete Wicks after cryptic social media post
item.description: Olivia Attwood has prompted renewed speculation about her relationship with Pete Wicks after sharing a cryptic social media post that fans interpreted as hinting at possible tension between the pair. ...

item.title: Canadian media misreports Supreme Court decision on Aboriginal title in New Brunswick
item.description: The Canadian Press incorrectly reported that the Supreme Court of Canada had ruled Aboriginal title could not apply to private property, creating widespread misinformation across national media outlet...

item.title: Student debt crisis leaves thousands of South African graduates without qualification certificates
item.description: South Africa’s higher education sector is facing a deepening student debt crisis, with outstanding debt at universities and colleges now reaching R59 billion. During a briefing to Parliament’s Portfol...

item.title: Federal Judge Questions Legality of Maurene Comey's Firing by Trump Administration
item.description: During a pretrial hearing in New York, a federal judge challenged a Department of Justice lawyer over the dismissal of Maurene Comey, daughter of former FBI Director James Comey. Maurene Comey, a DOJ ...

item.title: NCDC Reports 204 Lassa Fever Deaths with Rising Fatality Rate in Nigeria
item.description: The Nigeria Centre for Disease Control and Prevention (NCDC) don report say 204 people don die from Lassa fever so far dis year, as the disease fatality rate dey increase despite small drop in new cas...

item.title: Southern Alberta warns of rising Bow River levels and potential nuisance flooding
item.description: A wet weekend is forecast across southern Alberta with rising Bow River levels and the possibility of flooding in Banff National Park. Environment Canada predicts rainfall starting Saturday and contin...

item.title: SAPS investigates explosions at Woolworths stores in Free State and Gauteng
item.description: The South African Police Service (SAPS) has initiated a high-level investigation following explosions at Woolworths retail stores in both the Free State and Gauteng provinces. According to police stat...

item.title: Stella reacts strongly to Matthew's unexpected hug attempt in The Alibi Episode 53
item.description: In Episode 53 of the popular Filipino TV series 'The Alibi,' viewers witness a tense moment between Stella and Matthew. The scene revolves around Matthew attempting to hug Stella, which visibly annoys...

item.title: New Triassic crocodile relative reveals ostrich-like body plan and early archosaur evolution
item.description: Scientists have identified a newly described prehistoric species, Labrujasuchus expectatus, an unusual crocodile relative from the Late Triassic period that challenges traditional ideas about early ar...

item.title: Joao Fonseca defeats Novak Djokovic, halting his pursuit of a 25th Grand Slam title
item.description: Novak Djokovic’s pursuit of a historic 25th Grand Slam title has been brought to an abrupt halt after he was defeated by Brazilian teenager Joao Fonseca. The result marks a significant upset in men’s ...

item.title: Profile of Lydia Millen: British YouTuber, Fitness Enthusiast and Lifestyle Influencer
item.description: Lydia Elise Millen is a British YouTuber and lifestyle influencer who has built a strong following through her videos on fashion, makeup, fitness, and general lifestyle. Born on 14 April 1988 in Watfo...

item.title: New Texas Senate Poll Shows Tight Race Between Ken Paxton and James Talarico
item.description: A new poll from the Texas Public Opinion Research group suggests a competitive U.S. Senate race in Texas, with Democratic state lawmaker James Talarico leading Republican Attorney General Ken Paxton 4...
